title: Generational Timeline
description: A cinematic journey through 100 years of generational culture
prompt: Create a 30-second cinematic video showing a timeline morphing through generations: start with a 1940s black-and-white living room with a radio, dissolve into a 1960s Woodstock scene with vibrant colors, transition to an 1980s bedroom with MTV on a CRT TV and neon lights, shift to a late 1990s room with a bulky PC and AIM chat windows, transform into a modern bedroom with a ring light and TikTok on a phone, and end with a futuristic room with holographic AI interfaces. Each era should have period-accurate music fading in and out. Camera moves forward through time.

title: Generation Portraits
description: Stylized portraits representing each generation's aesthetic
prompt: Create six stylized portrait illustrations side by side, each representing a generation: Silent Generation (1940s sepia, fedora hat, radio), Baby Boomer (1960s psychedelic colors, peace sign, vinyl record), Gen X (1990s grunge, flannel shirt, Walkman), Millennial (2000s aesthetic, smartphone, avocado toast), Gen Z (colorful hair, ring light, TikTok interface), Gen Alpha (futuristic, VR headset, AI assistant). Dark background, neon accents, modern flat illustration style with gradient overlays.

title: Slang Battle
description: Animated conversation between generations using their era's slang
prompt: Create an animated short showing six characters from different generations trying to communicate. A 1950s greaser says 'That's swell!', a hippie says 'Far out, man!', a Gen Xer says 'Whatever, that's bogus', a Millennial says 'That's literally iconic', a Gen Z says 'No cap, that's bussin', and a Gen Alpha kid says 'That's so sigma skibidi'. Each character has their era's fashion and backdrop. Speech bubbles with stylized text. Comedic timing with confused reactions between generations.
